cards.name: bàn/ㄅㄢˋ
definitions: to take care of (a matter); to deal with (a task, procedure etc); to organize (an event)
to establish; to set up; to manage; to run (an enterprise)
(law) to handle; to investigate; to prosecute (a case or suspect)
(bound form) office (as in 招_|招_[zhāo bàn], admissions office) (abbr. for _公室|_公室[bàn gōng shì])

cards.name: bào/ㄅㄠˋ
definitions: to report; to inform; to announce
to sign up for; to register for (abbr. for _名|_名[bào míng])

cards.name: bèi/ㄅㄟˋ
definitions: used to indicate passive voice (placed before the doer of the action like "by" in English passive-voice sentences, or, if the doer is not mentioned, before the verb)

cards.name: bān/ㄅㄢ
definitions: to move (sth relatively heavy or bulky)

cards.name: bǎ/ㄅㄚˇ
definitions: to hold a baby in position to help it urinate or defecate

cards.name: bǎo/ㄅㄠˇ
definitions: (often used to transliterate -berg, -burg etc in place names)
(bound form) burger (abbr. for 漢_|汉_[hàn bǎo])

cards.name: chǎng/ㄔㄤˇ
definitions: large place used for a specific purpose

cards.name: chǔ/ㄔㄨˇ
definitions: Chinese kingdom during the Spring and Autumn and Warring States Periods (722–221 BC)

cards.name: cè/ㄘㄜˋ
definitions: (literary) to be mingled with; to be involved in

cards.name: dài/ㄉㄞˋ
definitions: to put on or wear (glasses, hat, gloves etc)

cards.name: dāo/ㄉㄠ
definitions: (Internet slang) to bargain; to ask for a small discount (esp. on second-hand marketplaces)

cards.name: fèn/ㄈㄣˋ
definitions: classifier for gifts, newspaper, magazine, papers, reports, contracts etc

variant of the character meaning: to divide; to separate, to distribute; to allocate, to distinguish (good and bad), (bound form) branch of (an organization); sub- (as in 分局[fēn jú]), to divide, minute, cent

cards.name: guà/ㄍㄨㄚˋ
definitions: to hang; to suspend (from a hook etc)
to be worried; to be concerned

cards.name: guài/ㄍㄨㄞˋ
definitions: to find strange; to regard as odd

cards.name: gān/ㄍㄢ
definitions: taken in to nominal kinship; adoptive; foster

cards.name: gāng/ㄍㄤ
definitions: just; only a short while ago

cards.name: huá/ㄏㄨㄚˊ
definitions: to scratch (cut into the surface of sth)

cards.name: hé/ㄏㄜˊ
definitions: (bound form) (on restaurant menus) rice noodles _粉[hé fěn]

cards.name: hēi/ㄏㄟ
definitions: short name for Heilongjiang _龍江|_龙江[Hēi lóng jiāng]

cards.name: hǎi/ㄏㄞˇ
definitions: great number of people or things

cards.name: jiè/ㄐㄧㄝˋ
definitions: (used in combination with 給|给[gěi] or 出[chū] etc) to lend
to make use of; to avail oneself of
(sometimes followed by 著|着[zhe]) by; with

cards.name: jiāo/ㄐㄧㄠ
definitions: to hand over; to deliver; to pay (money); to turn over

cards.name: jué/ㄐㄩㄝˊ
definitions: (of a dam etc) to breach or burst

cards.name: jì/ㄐㄧˋ
definitions: to entrust; to place in sb's care
(bound form) to depend on; to attach oneself to; to reside temporarily
(bound form) foster (as in _女[jì nu : 3] foster daughter)
to send by post; to mail

cards.name: kǎo/ㄎㄠˇ
definitions: to roast; to grill; to broil; to bake; to toast (bread)
to warm oneself by a fire

cards.name: la/˙ㄌㄚ
definitions: sentence-final particle, contraction of 了啊, indicating exclamation
particle placed after each item in a list of examples

cards.name: là/ㄌㄚˋ
definitions: (of chili pepper, raw onions etc) to sting

cards.name: má/ㄇㄚˊ
definitions: generic name for hemp, flax etc
hemp or flax fiber for textile materials

cards.name: mǎ/ㄇㄚˇ
definitions: (bound form) standard weight used with a balance scale

cards.name: shè/ㄕㄜˋ
definitions: (bound form) my (in speaking of relatives younger than oneself, as in _妹[shè mèi])
(archaic) unit of distance equal to 30 li 里[lǐ]

cards.name: shì/ㄕˋ
definitions: member of the senior ministerial class (old)

cards.name: shì/ㄕˋ
definitions: (literary) to trade; to buy and sell goods

cards.name: suàn/ㄙㄨㄢˋ
definitions: to count; to be valid; to carry weight
to regard as; to consider (to be ...)

cards.name: sòng/ㄙㄨㄥˋ
definitions: to send; to deliver; to transmit
to accompany; to go along with

cards.name: wǎng/ㄨㄤˇ
definitions: to net; to catch with a net

cards.name: xià/ㄒㄧㄚˋ
definitions: the Xia or Hsia dynasty c. 2000 BC

cards.name: xiāng/ㄒㄧㄤ
definitions: fret on the neck of a pipa 琵琶[pí pa] (a fret on the soundboard is called a 品[pǐn])

cards.name: xíng/ㄒㄧㄥˊ
definitions: (bound form) to walk; to go; to travel

cards.name: yuàn/ㄩㄢˋ
definitions: to wish (that sth may happen); may ...

cards.name: yíng/ㄧㄥˊ
definitions: to forge ahead (esp. in the face of difficulties); to meet face to face

cards.name: zhí/ㄓˊ
definitions: Zhi (c. 2000 BC), fifth of the legendary Flame Emperors 炎帝[Yán dì] descended from Shennong 神農|神农[Shén nóng] Farmer God

cards.name: zhù/ㄓㄨˋ
definitions: (bound form) to pour into; to flow into; to inject
(bound form) to focus (one's spirit, gaze etc) on a single point; to concentrate

cards.name: zhī/ㄓ
definitions: classifier for birds and certain animals, one of a pair, some utensils, vessels etc

cards.name: zǒng/ㄗㄨㄥˇ
definitions: anyway; after all; eventually; sooner or later

phrases.name: dōngbù/ㄉㄨㄥ ㄅㄨˋ
definitions: host (i.e. sitting on east side of guest)

phrases.name: fángzū/ㄈㄤˊ ㄗㄨ
definitions: rent for a room or house

phrases.name: guònián/ㄍㄨㄛˋ ㄋㄧㄢˊ
definitions: to celebrate the Chinese New Year

phrases.name: gāozhōng/ㄍㄠ ㄓㄨㄥ
definitions: to pass brilliantly (used in congratulatory fashion)

phrases.name: kāixué/ㄎㄞ ㄒㄩㄝˊ
definitions: the start of a new term

phrases.name: lóushàng/ㄌㄡˊ ㄕㄤˋ
definitions: (Internet slang) previous poster in a forum thread

phrases.name: shàngwǎng/ㄕㄤˋ ㄨㄤˇ
definitions: (of a document etc) to be uploaded to the Internet
(tennis, volleyball etc) to move in close to the net

phrases.name: shāfā/ㄕㄚ ㄈㄚ
definitions: (Internet slang) the first reply or replier to a forum post

phrases.name: xiàtiān/ㄒㄧㄚˋ ㄊㄧㄢ
definitions: the Xia or Hsia dynasty c. 2000 BC

phrases.name: xiāngxìn/ㄒㄧㄤ ㄒㄧㄣˋ
definitions: to be convinced (that sth is true)

phrases.name: xiǎngfǎ/ㄒㄧㄤˇ ㄈㄚˇ
definitions: to think of a way (to do sth)

phrases.name: yīxiàzi/ㄧ ㄒㄧㄚˋ ˙ㄗ
definitions: (used after a verb) give it a go
to do (sth for a bit to give it a try)

phrases.name: yīxiàzir/ㄧ ㄒㄧㄚˋ ˙ㄗㄦ
definitions: (used after a verb) give it a go
to do (sth for a bit to give it a try)

phrases.name: yǐwéi/ㄧˇ ㄨㄟˊ
definitions: to think (i.e. to take it to be true that ...) (Usually there is an implication that the notion is mistaken – except when expressing one's own current opinion.)
